name: Governance Digest
description: Monitors and summarizes governance activity for any DeFi/DAO protocol. Checks Snapshot, Tally, and protocol forums to produce an actionable digest of proposals, voting patterns, and stakeholder positions.

governanceUrl.description: Direct URL to governance portal (optional — auto-discovered if omitted)

timeRange.description: How far back to look for governance activity

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Executive summary of governance activity in the time period

fields.name: activeProposals
fields.description: Array of active/recent proposals with status, votes, and deadlines

fields.name: votingAnalysis
fields.description: Analysis of voting patterns: participation rate, whale influence, delegation trends

fields.name: stakeholderPositions
fields.description: Top 3 voters/delegates with their voting patterns and stated positions

fields.name: recommendedActions
fields.description: Actionable recommendations for a token holder

invariants.invariant: Check ALL three governance platforms for {{protocolName}}: (1) Snapshot (snapshot.org), (2) Tally (tally.xyz), (3) the protocol's own governance forum (e.g., governance.uniswap.org). If a platform has no presence for the protocol, explicitly note 'Not found on [platform]'.
invariants.measurement: Verify research notes reference all 3 platforms. Each must show either data extracted or 'not found' notation.

do: Search Snapshot for 'Uniswap' space, Tally for 'Uniswap' governor, and governance.uniswap.org for forum threads
dont: Only check Snapshot and skip Tally
Assume a protocol doesn't use on-chain governance without checking

invariants.invariant: For each proposal in activeProposals, include ALL of: title, status (active/passed/defeated/queued), currentVotes (for/against/abstain with percentages), quorumStatus (met/not met with numbers), deadline (ISO date or 'ended'), and proposalUrl (link to view).
invariants.measurement: For each item in result.activeProposals, verify all 6 fields are present and non-empty.

do: { title: 'Deploy Uniswap V3 on Blast', status: 'active', currentVotes: { for: '45M UNI (78%)', against: '12M UNI (22%)', abstain: '0' }, quorumStatus: 'Met (40M / 40M required)', deadline: '2026-02-15T00:00:00Z', proposalUrl: 'https://snapshot.org/#/...' }
dont: List proposal titles without vote counts

invariants.invariant: Identify the top 3 voters or delegates by voting power for {{protocolName}}. For each, include: address or ENS name, votingPower (tokens + percentage), recentVotes (how they voted on last 3 proposals), and publicPosition (any stated rationale from forum posts).
invariants.measurement: Verify result.stakeholderPositions has exactly 3 entries, each with address, votingPower, recentVotes, and publicPosition.

do: a]16z (18M UNI, 3.1%): Voted FOR on all 3 recent proposals. Forum post: 'We support protocol expansion to L2s.'
dont: List voters without their recent voting record

invariants.invariant: Provide at least 2 actionable recommendations for a token holder. Each recommendation must specify: action (what to do), rationale (why), deadline (when it matters by), and impact (what happens if ignored).
invariants.measurement: Verify result.recommendedActions has >= 2 entries, each with action, rationale, deadline, and impact fields.

do: { action: 'Vote on Proposal #42 before deadline', rationale: 'This proposal changes fee structure affecting LP returns', deadline: '2026-02-15', impact: 'If passed without your vote, fee switch could reduce LP APY by ~2%' }

invariants.invariant: Output MUST be valid JSON matching: { result: { summary, activeProposals, votingAnalysis, stakeholderPositions, recommendedActions } }. The summary must contextualize the governance activity within the broader protocol trajectory.
invariants.measurement: Validate JSON structure against outputSpec. All required fields present and correctly typed.

do: Return structured JSON with governance data from the specified time range
dont: Include proposals outside the requested timeRange
